## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing impact.

## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `cd web && npm run build`
- [ ] Manual verification completed where applicable

## Checklist

- [ ] API compatibility impact reviewed
- [ ] Migration impact reviewed
- [ ] Docs updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Screenshots added for visible UI changes when practical
- [ ] Follow-up work called out explicitly
